description: Silver Customers — identity and contact enrichment
query: SELECT customerID AS customer_id, INITCAP(TRIM(first_name)) AS first_name, INITCAP(TRIM(last_name)) AS last_name, CONCAT(INITCAP(TRIM(first_name)), ' ', INITCAP(TRIM(last_name))) AS full_name, LOWER(TRIM(email_address)) AS email_address, REGEXP_REPLACE(phone_number, '[^0-9+]', '') AS phone_number, TRIM(address) AS address, INITCAP(TRIM(city)) AS city, UPPER(TRIM(state)) AS state, UPPER(TRIM(country)) AS country, UPPER(TRIM(continent)) AS continent, TRIM(postal_zip_code) AS postal_zip_code, UPPER(LEFT(TRIM(gender), 1)) AS gender, current_timestamp() AS _silver_loaded_at FROM source

description: Silver Franchises — franchise master with full_refresh load
query: SELECT franchiseID, name, CAST(country AS string) AS country, UPPER(TRIM(city)) AS city, cast(size as string) AS size, current_timestamp() AS _silver_loaded_at FROM source WHERE supplierID IS NOT NULL

description: Silver Suppliers — supplier detail with approval filter
query: SELECT supplierID, name, ingredient, CAST(longitude as string) AS longitude, CAST(latitude AS string) AS latitude, current_timestamp() AS _silver_loaded_at FROM source WHERE approved = 'Y'
